name: Jiangxi Wannianqing Cement Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Wannianqing Cement Co., Ltd. produces and sells cement in China. Its products include ordinary Portland cement and composite Portland cement; commercial concrete of different grades for urban construction, high-rise buildings, railways, subways, bridges, etc.; prestressed concrete water pipes; and other building materials. The company was founded in 1958 and is based in Nanchang, China.
